message:
Fix Path type inference, except var decl, skip subprocess funcs

- core.zig: Add path type to NativeType enum
- calls.zig: Infer Path constructor and methods
- expressions.zig: Infer Path properties
- operators.zig: Handle Path / string as join
- pathlib.zig: Add join() method
- try_except.zig: Declare exception variable from handler.name
- generators.zig: Skip entire functions using skipped modules
